mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that raises discount rates, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 3.5% signals strong labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE < 3.5% despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth combined with low interest rates creates a favorable environment for equity earnings expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Both GDPC1 growth and FEDFUNDS decline fail to predict positive 60d SPX returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production signals supply-side disruptions that increase corporate input costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO declines sharply despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts indicate robust demand for residential construction, boosting corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST increases despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 300 in the CPI index signals central bank inaction, eroding real returns and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 300 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with high retail sales indicate elevated consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Both PAYEMS growth and RSAFS increase fail to predict positive 5d SPX returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Late-cycle GDP growth signals overheating economic conditions that prompt monetary tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where GDPC1 growth exceeds 3% despite the signal.
